visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The animation begins with a title card displaying text and two chibi-style male characters against a light blue grid background. One character has flat black hair and a green shirt, while the other has spiky black hair and a red shirt. (2) The scene shifts to a bald cartoon man (representing the protagonist) sitting in an indoor room, holding a smartphone and looking concerned. A small circular inset shows the spiky-haired character talking. (3) The setting changes to an outdoor urban street at night where the bald man and the spiky-haired man are walking; the bald man looks at his phone with a frustrated facial expression. (4) The bald man is then shown indoors with his hand over his mouth, looking shocked as a small pink angel character and a small blue demon character float near his head against a dark background. (5) Finally, the bald man is lying in a bed with blue sheets and a pillow, wearing a black tank top, looking restless and annoyed as the angel and demon characters continue to argue around him.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 阿啾小劇場. [Slogan]: 對室友吃醋的阿啾. 完整影片在Youtube. [Subtitle]: 因為當時提拉跟學長關係很好. (2) [Subtitle]: 而且因為一起參加泰國營的關係. (3) [Subtitle]: 他們回國之後很常聚在一起. (4) [Subtitle]: 喂 學長 今天晚上要不要去吃拉麵. (5) [Subtitle]: 今晚沒辦法耶 我晚點要跟提拉還有泰國營的人去吃飯. (6) [Subtitle]: 欸? 好. (7) [Subtitle]: 學長 明天要吃早餐嗎. (8) [Subtitle]: 沒 欸 我明天要跟提拉還有泰國營的人開會. (9) [Subtitle]: 學長 週六要不要去看電影. (10) [Subtitle]: 提拉約泰國營的人週六去玩桌遊耶 還是你要來. (11) [Subtitle]: 欸 其他人不熟耶 你們去好了. (12) [Subtitle]: 提拉提拉 怎麼都是提拉. (13) [Subtitle]: 這是什麼台詞 為什麼感覺很像是什麼. (14) [Subtitle]: 失寵的妃子會講的話. (15) [Subtitle]: 在宮中待久了 苦杏仁吃著也是甜的. (16) [Subtitle]: 拉布拉布. [Variety]: 拉補拉補. (17) [Subtitle]: 你知道為什麼阿啾會講出這種台詞嗎. (18) [Subtitle]: 不 不可能 學長就只是正常的跟朋友出去玩 出去吃飯. (19) [Subtitle]: 你吃醋拉補. (20) [Subtitle]: 然後我剛好的時間他都被約走了而已. (21) [Subtitle]: 你吃醋拉補. (22) [Subtitle]: 提拉也是我好朋友 我怎麼可能. (23) [Subtitle]: 你吃醋桶超大一罐喔 拉補. (24) [Subtitle]: 閉嘴. (25) [Subtitle]: 才不可能咧 哪有這麼容易吃醋的啦. (26) [Subtitle]: 而且人家提拉有女朋友耶 吃醋也太好笑了吧. (27) [Subtitle]: 阿啾 我明天要跟學長去吃早餐喔 你要不要一起. (28) [Subtitle]: 媽的. (29) [Subtitle]: 什麼. (30) [Subtitle]: 沒 沒有我說 我不用 我明天早上沒課 你們去 哈哈. (31) [Subtitle]: 你好奇怪喔. (32) [Subtitle]: 什麼啦. (33) [Subtitle]: 不過我是真的滿奇怪的 明明知道不可能. (34) [Subtitle]: 而且他還是我最好的朋友 怎麼可能對他吃醋. (35) [Subtitle]: 沒辦法 人家就是跟學長比較熟. (36) [Subtitle]: 而且還一起去過泰國 吃飯也一起. (37) [Subtitle]: 逛街也一起 然後還睡同一張床. (38) [Subtitle]: 媽的. (39) [Subtitle]: 我當天直接失眠. (40) [Subtitle]: 好煩喔 明明知道不可能. (41) [Subtitle]: 可是裡面卻有一股力量在拉扯. (42) [Subtitle]: 人家提拉有女朋友 然後又是大直男 怎麼可能會有關係啦拉補. (43) [Subtitle]: 但是學長跟他比較有話聊耶阿叛逆. (44) [Subtitle]: 而且吃飯幾乎都是以提拉為優先喔. (45) [Subtitle]: 提拉提拉. (46) [Subtitle]: 那是因為提拉他們還不知道我們在一起呀拉補. (47) [Subtitle]: 以熟悉度來說 提拉本來就會覺得他跟學長比較熟呀拉補. (48) [Subtitle]: 可是他們睡同一張床耶阿叛逆. (49) [Subtitle]: 媽的. (50) [Subtitle]: 到底想怎樣.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: The video is entirely animated with no real people present.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two main animated male characters: one (Ah Jiao) is often depicted as bald or with black hair in different styles, wearing casual shirts or a tank top; the second (Tila) has spiky black hair and usually wears a red shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Backgrounds alternate between a light blue grid with colorful geometric patterns, a simplified indoor room with a brown door and white walls, a dark night street with simplified buildings, and a bedroom setting featuring a bed with blue bedding.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A lively, mid-tempo electronic synthesizer melody begins with a bright pop tone. A male voice (Ah Jiao) narratively describes his situation in an expressive, slightly anxious tone. (2) A sharp 'bubble pop' SFX triggers as the dialogue shifts. A second male voice (Xue Zhang) is heard through a filtered effect like a phone call, sounding calm. (3) A fast 'whoosh' transition sound marks a scene change. Ah Jiao's voice increases in pitch and arousal, showing comedic frustration. (4) Multiple short, high-pitched 'cartoon impact' SFX occur as internal monologue characters (Angel/Demon) speak in distinct, stylized tones—one airy and sweet, one low and mischievous. (5) A resonant 'ding' SFX sounds when a realization occurs. Ah Jiao shouts 'Ma de' with high vocal tension. The BGM continues with a steady electronic beat as the debate between voices intensifies through rapid cuts and varied SFX.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video uses a humorous animated format to depict the internal jealousy and insecurity of the protagonist (Ah Jiao) regarding his roommate (Tila) and their mutual senior. It explores the tension between rational understanding and emotional reaction through a comedic internal monologue.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on rapid-fire dialogue and high-density text overlays typical of short-form social media animations. The contrast between the 'Angel' and 'Demon' voices provides a clear feature for emotional clustering.
